description.description: Shown on the home-page TOC card for this ritual.

musicFileSlug.description: Slug of the /files entry holding this ritual's music sheet; renders a reference link when set.

hasPlayer.description: The ritual has a bespoke guided player at /rituals/<slug>/play. Building a player is a code task — only set this once that route exists.

hidden.description: Hidden from nav, home TOC, and sitemap; still reachable by direct URL.
